description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:artful Docker image. Define a single job named jobs (default stage) that runs the following script steps: `apt-get update`, `apt-get -y install sudo gnome-software-dev git wget git cmake g++ libcurl4-openssl-dev libx11-dev libz-dev libssl-dev vim-common desktop-file-utils libinotifytools0-dev libarchive-dev libfuse-dev liblzma-dev`, `git submodule update --init --recursive`, `bash -xe travis/travis-build.sh`, and `ls -lh .`. The job should publish the file `libgs-plugin-appimage.so` as an artifact. No caching, rules, or additional services are defined.
